div.h1: Pool Structure: Contiguous Region to Blocks

g.text: When FREE: next points to next free block
When ALLOC: entire block is user data

div.p: total_size = block_size * capacity = 64 * N bytes Block i address: base + (i * block_size) = base + (i * 64) Block i offset: i * 64 bytes

ul.li: aligned_alloc(max_align_t, total) Result: All blocks aligned!
